$schema: Vitablabla post registry. To add a daily post: 1) duplicate posts/_template.html as posts/<your-slug>.html, write the body. 2) Add an entry to the top of the 'posts' array below. 3) Commit + push.

settings.tagline: Snack ideas, product stories, and everyday guides for modern cravings.

posts.title: Why modern snacks are becoming more sensory.

posts.title: What freeze-drying does to a strawberry.
